description: Schema for a single judge-model response record. All demo records carry data_status = synthetic_demo. Raw responses are preserved and never overwritten.

field_types.parsed_item_scores: object mapping item_id -> numeric score on the item's native scale

provenance_fields.data_status: synthetic_demo for every record in this package
provenance_fields.seed: fixed integer seed recorded per run

notes: R1 pilot is machine-only: target_identity is retained as a schema field but fixed to 'machine' (see identity_scope_decision.md).
judge_model_id is NOT a material factor; both models judge the same 96 materials (2 x 96 = 192 responses per repeat).
raw_response is preserved; scoring reads parsed_item_scores and never mutates raw_response.
No missing-value imputation: a construct score is only computed when all its member items are present and valid.
